label: help_post_pr1
stdout:
Usage: python -m thoth [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...

  thoth — research orchestration.

  Run research:    thoth ask "question" | thoth deep_research "topic" | thoth
  -m MODE -q PROMPT Manage thoth:    thoth init | thoth status OP | thoth list
  | thoth config ... | thoth providers ...

  For per-command help: thoth COMMAND --help

Options:
  -m, --mode TEXT                 Research mode
  -q, --prompt TEXT               Research prompt
  -F, --prompt-file TEXT          Read prompt from file (use - for stdin)
  -A, --async                     Submit and exit
  -R, --resume TEXT               Resume operation by ID
  -p, --project TEXT              Project name
  -o, --output-dir TEXT           Override output directory
  -P, --provider [openai|perplexity|mock]
                                  Single provider
  --input-file TEXT               Use the file at PATH as input for this mode.
                                  Use when feeding a non-thoth document, an
                                  older run, or a file from a different
                                  project.
  --auto                          Pick up the latest output from the previous
                                  mode in the same --project directory. The
                                  happy path for chaining modes.
  -v, --verbose                   Enable debug output
  -V, --version                   Show version and exit
  --api-key-openai TEXT           API key for OpenAI provider (not
                                  recommended; prefer env vars)
  --api-key-perplexity TEXT       API key for Perplexity provider (not
                                  recommended; prefer env vars)
  --api-key-mock TEXT             API key for Mock provider (not recommended;
                                  prefer env vars)
  -c, --config TEXT               Path to custom config file
  --combined                      Generate combined report from multiple
                                  providers
  -Q, --quiet                     Minimal output during execution
  --no-metadata                   Disable metadata headers and prompt section
                                  in output files
  -T, --timeout FLOAT             Override request timeout in seconds
  -i, --interactive               Enter interactive prompt mode
  --clarify                       Start interactive mode in Clarification Mode
  -M, --pick-model                Interactively pick a model (immediate modes
                                  only)
  -h, --help                      Show this message and exit.

Run research:
  status  Check status of a research operation by ID.
  list    List research operations.

Manage thoth:
  init       Initialize thoth configuration.
  config     Inspect and edit configuration.
  modes      List research modes with provider/model/kind.
  providers  Manage provider models and API keys.
  help       Show help (general or for a specific topic).

Modes (positional):
  Pass as the first positional argument: clarification, comparison, deep_dive,
  deep_research, default, exploration, mini_research, prd, solution, tdd,
  thinking, tutorial

  Example: thoth deep_research "explain transformers"
